debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
i j : ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
hi : i ∈ u
hj : j ∈ u
⊢ map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) P = map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) P

proof:
by
    have h (k : ι) : map (fun ω ↦ k ∈ X ω) P =
        toNNReal p • dirac (k ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False := by
      rw [← Measure.map_map (measurable_pi_apply k) hX.aemeasurable, hX.map_eq,
        bernoulliOn_eq_map, Measure.map_map (measurable_pi_apply k)
        MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable, Measure.map_eval_infinitePi]
      exact fun _ ↦ inferInstance
    rw [h i, h j, hi, hj]
